pos_sentences.text: Social interaction os good campus life is good the relevance course is better placement services is good effectiveness provided better thane other colleges teaching better than other colleges

pos_sentences.text: Supporting and good learning facilities and course and fees less can improve knowledge including campus is good personal and professional good and ground is good i like my college amenities and quality is good career development is good

pos_sentences.text: I like my college and teachers and facilities and good teaching also good placement mentorship good friends and development professional campus and lab facilities and good communication skill good class rooms
